description: Safe math evaluation and JSON Schema validation.

tools.description: Evaluate an arithmetic expression exactly (no model arithmetic), or compute summary statistics (mean, median, std, percentiles) over a list of numbers. Always prefer this for any calculation.

schema.name: mode
schema.description: 'eval' to evaluate an expression, or 'stats' for summary statistics.

schema.name: expression
schema.description: Arithmetic expression when mode is 'eval', e.g. '(1500 * 1.08) / 12'. Supports + - * / // % **, sqrt, log, sin, abs, round, min, max, sum, pi, e. Max 4000 chars.

schema.name: values
schema.description: List of numbers when mode is 'stats' (JSON array).

tools.description: Check that a data object conforms to a JSON Schema and list any violations. Use as a quality gate or to verify an API/tool response has the expected structure before continuing.

schema.name: data
schema.description: The data to validate (object/array or JSON string).

schema.name: schema
schema.description: A JSON Schema (Draft 2020-12) describing the expected shape.

schema.name: mode
schema.description: 'best_effort' returns all violations; 'fail_fast' stops at the first violation.
